% Auto-generated from output/results/results.csv
% Compares Random Forest, SVM, and Logistic Regression over the 8-year study period.
% Precision and Recall are for the positive (Up) class on the hold-out test set.
% F1 = 2 * Precision * Recall / (Precision + Recall)
% MWFV = Moving Window Forward Validation
\begin{table}[htbp]
\centering
\caption{8-Year Period with engineered features: Three-Method Comparison of Random Forest, SVM, and Logistic Regression}
\label{tab:8yrs_3methods_comparison}
\resizebox{\textwidth}{!}{%
\begin{tabular}{llrrrrrrrrrr}
\toprule
\textbf{Model} & \textbf{Parameters} & \textbf{Avg Train Acc} & \textbf{Std Train Acc} & \textbf{Avg CV Test Acc} & \textbf{Std CV Test Acc} & \textbf{MWFV Avg Acc} & \textbf{MWFV Std Acc} & \textbf{Hold-out Test Acc} & \textbf{Precision} & \textbf{Recall} & \textbf{F1} \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{12}{l}{\textit{Random Forest (train $n=396$, test $n=100$; cluster + sector + corr features)}} \\
\midrule
Base RF         & n\_est=250, depth=10, feat=sqrt & 1.0000 & 0.0000 & 0.4950 & 0.0330 & 0.4750 & 0.0610 & 0.5600 & 0.5540 & 0.7880 & 0.6506 \\
PCA RF          & n\_est=500, depth=5,  feat=sqrt & 1.0000 & 0.0000 & 0.5190 & 0.0240 & 0.4710 & 0.0620 & 0.5100 & 0.5320 & 0.4810 & 0.5052 \\
LASSO RF        & n\_est=500, depth=2,  feat=sqrt & 0.9140 & 0.0450 & 0.5120 & 0.0720 & 0.4570 & 0.1110 & 0.4600 & 0.4840 & 0.5960 & 0.5342 \\
Ridge RF        & n\_est=500, depth=10, feat=sqrt & 1.0000 & 0.0000 & 0.4950 & 0.0360 & 0.4930 & 0.0930 & 0.4600 & 0.4830 & 0.5580 & 0.5178 \\
Stepwise RF     & n\_est=500, depth=5,  feat=sqrt & 0.9850 & 0.0210 & 0.6570 & 0.0380 & 0.4570 & 0.0550 & 0.5100 & 0.5310 & 0.5000 & 0.5150 \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{12}{l}{\textit{SVM (train $n=1604$, test $n=401$; raw OHLCV features)}} \\
\midrule
Linear Ker. SVM & C=0.05,  kernel=linear, $\gamma$=scale & 0.7060 & 0.0550 & 0.4890 & 0.0130 & 0.4820 & 0.0730 & 0.5240 & 0.5820 & 0.4240 & 0.4906 \\
RBF Ker. SVM    & C=1,     kernel=rbf,    $\gamma$=scale & 0.8070 & 0.0470 & 0.5030 & 0.0240 & 0.4930 & 0.0640 & 0.5140 & 0.5570 & 0.4980 & 0.5259 \\
Poly. Ker. SVM  & C=0.1,   kernel=poly,   $\gamma$=0.01  & 0.6810 & 0.0820 & 0.5430 & 0.0240 & 0.5130 & 0.0900 & 0.5360 & 0.5470 & 0.8390 & 0.6625 \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{12}{l}{\textit{Logistic Regression (train $n=1604$, test $n=401$; raw OHLCV features)}} \\
\midrule
LASSO Log. Reg.     & C=10.0, $\ell_1$-ratio=1 & 0.7050 & 0.0890 & 0.4950 & 0.0320 & 0.4830 & 0.0770 & 0.5210 & 0.5570 & 0.5620 & 0.5595 \\
Ridge Log. Reg.     & C=0.05, $\ell_1$-ratio=0 & 0.6860 & 0.0710 & 0.4970 & 0.0320 & 0.4860 & 0.0790 & 0.5210 & 0.5560 & 0.5760 & 0.5659 \\
PCA Ridge Log. Reg. & C=0.01, $\ell_1$-ratio=0 & 0.5590 & 0.0260 & 0.4870 & 0.0440 & 0.4790 & 0.0770 & 0.4940 & 0.5780 & 0.2400 & 0.3392 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}%
}
\par\medskip
\footnotesize
\textbf{Notes:} Precision, Recall, and F1 are reported for the positive (``Up'') class on the hold-out test set.
F1 is computed as $2 \cdot \text{Precision} \cdot \text{Recall} / (\text{Precision} + \text{Recall})$.
MWFV = Moving Window Forward Validation.
Random Forest models use clustered, sector, and correlation features (185 raw inputs reduced via PCA, LASSO, or Ridge selection);
SVM and Logistic Regression models use 182 raw OHLCV features without clustering or sector grouping.
True positive rate (Up) in the test set is approximately 0.52 for all models.
\end{table}
